content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence aaa and its first nnn elements.

The iii-th element of the sequence, where i>ni > ni>n is generated by the following formula.

The iii-th element i>ni > ni>n would be the floor of the mean of the last nnn elements of the sequence. Formally,

ai=‚Ćä‚ąĎk=0n‚ąí1ai‚ąín+kn‚Ćča_i = \left\lfloor \frac{\sum_{k=0}^{n-1} a_{i-n+k}}{n} \right\rfloorai‚Äč=‚Ćän‚ąĎk=0n‚ąí1‚Äčai‚ąín+k‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč

For example,

an+1=‚Ćäa1+a2+‚čĮ+ann‚Ćča_{n+1} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_1 + a_2 + \dots + a_{n}}{n} \right\rflooran+1‚Äč=‚Ćäna1‚Äč+a2‚Äč+‚čĮ+an‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč
an+2=‚Ćäa2+a3+‚čĮ+an+1n‚Ćča_{n+2} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_2 + a_3 + \dots + a_{n+1}}{n} \right\rflooran+2‚Äč=‚Ćäna2‚Äč+a3‚Äč+‚čĮ+an+1‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč
an+3=‚Ćäa3+a4+‚čĮ+an+2n‚Ćča_{n+3} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_3 + a_4 + \dots + a_{n+2}}{n} \right\rflooran+3‚Äč=‚Ćäna3‚Äč+a4‚Äč+‚čĮ+an+2‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč

You have to answer many queries in which you would be asked to tell some xxx-th element of the sequence, where xxx would be provided in the query.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
First line of each test case contains an integer nnn.
The second line of each test case contains nnn space-separated integers where the iii-th integer denotes the value of aia_iai‚Äč.
The third line contains an integer QQQ denoting the number of queries.
Each of the next QQQ lines contains an integer xxx, denoting that you should tell what's the xxx-th element of the sequence.


Output Format
For each query, output an integer denoting the value of the corresponding element of the sequence.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The 4th element of the array would be ‚Ćä2+2+33‚Ćč=‚Ćä73‚Ćč=2\left\lfloor \frac{2+2+3}{3} \right\rfloor = \left\lfloor \frac{7}{3} \right\rfloor = 2‚Ćä32+2+3‚Äč‚Ćč=‚Ćä37‚Äč‚Ćč=2
